textByHash.fb3bfde11fe8e377747f5035c8001106c4d4941b: Please, stop this, just let me go!
textByHash.b06f9ac5f6d1f82e2ca6b76e2bf2b3ec27b1ac43: No...yes....whatever you say, just don't hurt me!
textByHash.492aabc21aac7d7a41dd39adddd6b0df0897bc4a: Umm.....the one with that vampyre in it who lives in a big house.
textByHash.f01aa5ed883f38cdc2cb87730566f9a639a754e6: Oh Guthix please no, please don't, I don't want to die!
textByHash.16c62b51ed0f642b79b3513a985892bdd2753b6d: Oh yes, yes, I know it! Count Draynor!
textByHash.f26f141edb97a9e305e7fbadb727bcb9f2bd4296: Ha, in your face you masked freak!
textByHash.d7475f47951502f0fe3938af4c1232efe7f9fdd8: No, no you tricked me! This isn't fair, ask me another...
